title: Plastic Bee Nest Retexture
description: Make wasp nests from the Plastic Texture Pack look like actual bee nests!
body:
![Beenest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NgUKxHAr/images/db1827c890069af4c09d30cca4aadeb264ddb30e.jpeg)

### <center>In the Plastic Texture Pack, bee nests are made to appear like wasp nests. A creative choice, but personally I prefer it to look more true to the vanilla texture. So, tada!</center>

## <center>**⊱ ────── {⋅. ✯ .⋅} ────── ⊰**
